title: Debate Record
description: Layer 5 debate output for a single ticker. The document Layer 6 (synthesis) operates on. Contains bull and bear positions, auto-detected contentions, and debate-adjusted scores.

contentions.description: Points of disagreement auto-detected from overlapping evidence citations. Sorted CRITICAL first.

adjudication.description: Chief Analyst resolution set during Layer 6 synthesis. Null until adjudicated.

base_evidence_score.description: Layer 4 evidence_score, unchanged. Present for traceability.

base_confidence_score.description: Layer 4 confidence_score, unchanged. Present for traceability.

debate_evidence_score.description: evidence_score after applying net debate adjustment. Passed to Layer 6.

debate_confidence_score.description: confidence_score after applying net debate adjustment. Passed to Layer 6.

net_score_adjustment.description: (bull_score_adj + bear_score_adj) / 2. Positive = debate shifted bullish; negative = shifted bearish.

outcome.description: bull_prevails: provisional_net > +3.5. bear_prevails: provisional_net < -3.5. inconclusive: |bull_adj - bear_adj| > 12 with |provisional_net| <= 3.5. balanced: otherwise. not_computable: a Round 1 position failed to parse after retry; baseline scores are passed through and debate_invalid is set.

original_conviction.description: Layer 4 conviction, passed through for traceability.

original_recommendation.description: Layer 4 recommendation, passed through for traceability.

evidence_cited.description: evidence_ids from the EvidencePacket supporting this case

contested_items.description: evidence_ids from the opposing case being actively disputed

risk.description: Specific risk not in the original EvidencePacket.

grounding.description: EV-ID, disclosed-fact reference, or labeled inference. Ungrounded entries are DEFEATED by the bull rebuttal.

raised_risks.description: Bear lane — risks the bear surfaces beyond the packet.

strength.description: Specific positive factor not already weighted in supporting_evidence.

grounding.description: EV-ID, disclosed-fact reference, or labeled inference. Ungrounded entries are DEFEATED by the bear rebuttal.

raised_strengths.description: Bull lane — strengths the bull surfaces beyond the packet. Bear leaves this empty.

scenario_price.description: Per-analyst price scenario interpreted by analyst_role. Bull: price if upside / quality case plays out. Bear: price if fundamental-risk case plays out. R1-only — rebuttals do not emit or revise.

price.description: Per-share price under this analyst's case.

mechanism.description: Stated path from disclosed inputs to the price (e.g. guided EPS × terminal multiple, intrinsic-value math, multiple-compression × growth-deceleration).

grounding.description: EV-IDs and disclosed facts supporting the mechanism.

score_adjustment.description: Analyst's recommended adjustment to the Layer 4 evidence_score

confidence_adjustment.description: Analyst's recommended adjustment to the Layer 4 confidence_score

learning_hooks.description: Falsifiable predictions from this analyst. Checked at 90/180/365 days. Empty list if analyst did not return hooks.
